Name: Super Credit & Sample Arrows
Description: Blue arrows mark Super Credits. Purple arrows mark Samples (all 18 sample types).

Options.Name: Arrow
Options.Description: Blue = Super Credits. Purple = Samples (preview, no patches yet).

SubOptions.Name: Blue - Super Credits (glowing)
SubOptions.Description: Blue arrows over Super Credits, glowing.

SubOptions.Name: Blue - Super Credits (no glow)
SubOptions.Description: Blue arrows over Super Credits, not glowing.

SubOptions.Name: Purple - Samples (no glow)
SubOptions.Description: Arrows over all Samples (common/rare/super), not glowing.
